channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Phone+ : le téléphone français volontairement bête pour les adolescents est de retour
item.description: La marque française The Phone relance un nouveau téléphone destiné aux adolescents. Objectif : zéro connexion Internet et revenir à un simple téléphone.

item.title: Donut Lab says latest test proves its solid-state battery isn’t a supercapacitor.
item.description: When Donut Lab first announced its solid-state battery earlier this year, there was some speculation around whether the Finnish startup had actually produced a supercapacitor, which is a much shorter-term form of electrical storage. Supercapacitors can charge and discharge quickly, similar to Donut Lab's claimed solid-state battery. But supercapacitors are totally different from batteries in […]...

item.title: A Daily Multivitamin Might Actually Slow Down Your Biological Clock, Study Finds
item.description: New research bolsters the idea that a once-daily supplement can cause real improvements to our rate of aging.

item.title: Xprize founder Peter Diamandis launches new contest to manifest a new Star Trek
item.description: The famed author and investor has launched the Future Vision Xprize with sponsors like Google, Marc Benioff, Ben Horowitz, to fund optimistic sci-fi films.

item.title: Un même jeu, plusieurs tarifs : PlayStation teste des prix différents selon les joueurs
item.description: Sony ne va probablement pas se faire que des amis. Le constructeur teste discrètement sur le PS Store un système de tarification dynamique inspiré du transport aérien. Selon les joueurs, un même jeu peut ainsi être affiché à des prix différents — parfois avec des remises personnalisées.

item.title: Qualcomm’s partnership with Neura Robotics is just the beginning
item.description: Neura Robotics is going to build new robots on top of Qualcomm's new IQ10 processors that were released at CES.

item.title: Microsoft announces Copilot Cowork with help from Anthropic — a cloud-powered AI agent that works across M365 apps
item.description: If you thought Anthropic was about to run away with the enterprise AI business...you're not totally off the mark, actually.This morning, Microsoft announced "Copilot Cowork" a new cloud-based AI agentic automation tool within Microsoft's existing AI tool 365 Copilot, except now it can complete work on users' behalf across many Microsoft apps, instead of contained within each one. If it sounds suspiciously similar to Anthropic's own "Claude Cowork" applications for Mac and Windows (released in January and February of 2026, respectively) that's to be expected — as Microsoft and Anthropic worked ...

item.title: Russian government hackers targeting Signal and WhatsApp users, Dutch spies warn
item.description: Dutch intelligence is accusing Russia-backed hackers of running a “large-scale global” hacking campaign against Signal and WhatsApp users.

item.title: Sam Altman says GPT-5.4 is his 'favorite model to talk to' — but admits OpenAI still needs to fix these 3 weaknesses
item.description: Sam Altman says GPT-5.4 is OpenAI’s best conversational model yet, but admits it still has three important weaknesses to fix.

item.title: Live Nation settlement avoids breakup with Ticketmaster
item.description: To keep Ticketmaster, Live Nation is going to have to make some major changes. As first reported by Politico, Live Nation reached a settlement with the Department of Justice in its antitrust case that accused the live entertainment giant of monopolistic practices. Live Nation will reportedly pay at least $200 million in damages to states that were part of the lawsuit filed in May 2024, but avoid selling off Ticketmaster. Live Nation will also be required to make a few changes to its business practices. According to NBC News, Ticketmaster, a subsidiary of Live Nation, will be required to create...

item.title: The Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphones are 'the best of the XM4 and XM5' — and they've crashed to a record-low price
item.description: The Sony WH-1000XM6 Wireless Headphones are some of the best headphones around and they're now back to a record-low price on Amazon.

item.title: Vers un Frandroid plus fort : pourquoi nous lançons Frandroid+
item.description: Derrière nos nouvelles options de consentement se cache un immense chantier technique qui va transformer votre façon d'interagir avec la communauté Frandroid.

item.title: Salt Typhoon is hacking the world’s phone and internet giants. Here’s everywhere that’s been hit.
item.description: Salt Typhoon is by far one of the most prolific hacking groups in recent years, breaching some of the top American phone companies. Here are all the countries that have been targeted.

item.title: Save $900 on a pre-built Alienware rig thats ready to play right out of the box
item.description: As of March 9, you can get the Alienware Aurora Gaming Desktop for $1,249.99, down from $2,149.99, at Dell.

item.title: Anthropic sues US government over supply chain risk designation
item.description: According to Reuters, Anthropic has filed a lawsuit to prevent the Pentagon from adding the company it a national security blocklist. This comes days after the Department of Defense sent a letter to Anthropic confirming the company was labeled a supply chain risk; at the time CEO Dario Amodei had all but guaranteed Anthropic would fight back with legal action.The lawsuit claims the designation is unlawful and violated free speech and due process rights. “These actions are unprecedented and unlawful. The Constitution does not allow ​the government to wield its enormous power to punish a company...

item.title: Airline travel prices are surging: How you can book cheaper flights this week
item.description: Book cheaper airline travel before ticket prices surge with these spring travel deals from Southwest, JetBlue, Spirit, and Frontier.

item.title: Anthropic sues Defense Department over supply chain risk designation
item.description: Anthropic filed suit against the Department of Defense on Monday after the agency labeled it a supply chain risk. The complaint calls the DOD's actions "unprecedented and unlawful."

item.title: Yashica’s new retro point-and-shoot revival sounds surprisingly capable for $100
item.description: Yashica has announced a new throwback camera called the Tank for photographers embracing the recent resurgence in the popularity of point-and-shoots. But while Canon's resurrected Elph 360 HS costs close to $400 and the $30 Kodak Charmera produces awful results, the Yashica Tank appears to offer a decent amount of functionality for the price. It's […]...

item.title: Les meilleurs VTC électriques en 2026 : quel vélo tout chemin choisir ?
item.description: Vous cherchez un vélo électrique polyvalent, qui vous permette de vous déplacer en ville tout comme vous balader en forêt ? Un VTC électrique (Vélo Tout Chemin) vous permettra de tout faire sans effort. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs modèles de type VTC électrique.

item.title: Ultrapuissant, dopé à l’IA et noté 9/10, le récent robot aspirateur-laveur de Dyson est encore plus recommandable avec 300 € de moins
item.description: Dyson a récemment lancé son Spot+Scrub AI, un aspirateur robot haut de gamme très puissant qui lave efficacement les sols et identifie un tas d'objets sur son chemin grâce à l'IA. Actuellement, vous le trouverez à 899 euros au lieu de 1 199 euros chez plusieurs e-commerçants.

item.title: Les joueurs de Call of Duty sont ceux qui cherchent le plus à tricher selon une étude
item.description: Parmi les jeux en ligne dans lesquels la triche est un gros problème, Call of Duty est très souvent cité. Et d'après une étude de Surfshark, c'est à raison.

item.title: Elijah Wood Doesn’t Want Anyone Else Playing Frodo While He’s Still Alive
item.description: The actor is already returning to reprise his 'Lord of the Rings' role once more in 'The Hunt for Gollum'.

item.title: Marketers! Now is the time to apply for 2026 Brands That Matter
item.description: Apply before the end of the day on March 13 to get the Super Early rate. The deadline to claim the Super Early rate for Fast Company’s Brands That Matter is this Friday. Rates go up March 13 at 11:59 p.m. ET.

item.title: Anthropic Sues Department of Defense Over Supply-Chain Risk Designation
item.description: The Claude chatbot developer says the Trump administration overstepped by escalating a contract dispute into a federal ban on the company’s technology.

item.title: This Lenovo Legion Pro 7i RTX 5070 laptop deal is a true desktop replacement - with Core Ultra 7, 32GB RAM, and 2TB SSD, and a huge $260 price cut
item.description: Lenovo Legion Pro 7i is a great laptop for creatives, developers, and power users and it's a huge $260 off right now.

item.title: Sleep Week 2026: Celebrate by saving hundreds on a new mattress, fresh pillows, sleep earbuds, and more
item.description: Sleep Week 2026 has deals on sleep trackers, Purple mattresses, Coop pillows, and more.

item.title: X says you can block Grok from editing your photos
item.description: X has introduced a new feature that makes it slightly harder for other users to manipulate your uploaded images with the Grok chatbot. As reported by Social Media Today and verified by The Verge, a new toggle within the image upload settings on the X iOS appsays it can "block modifications by Grok" when enabled. […]

item.title: Global stock markets jolt after surge in oil prices as attacks in the Middle East continue
item.description: Oil tanker traffic in the Strait of Hormuz has come to a halt because of worries about a possible attack by Iran. Stock markets shuddered worldwide Monday on worries about whether the global economy can withstand spiking prices for oil, which briefly got to nearly $120 per barrel, their highest level since four summers ago.The S&P 500 fell 1.3%, coming off its worst week since October. The Dow Jones Industrial Average was down 721 points, or 1.5%, as of 9:35 a.m. Eastern time, and the Nasdaq composite was 1.2% lower. That followed even worse losses in European and Asian stock markets.Since the...

item.title: Anthropic's Claude Marketplace allows customers to buy third-party cloud services
item.description: Anthropic wants its customers to use their existing AI spend commitments to spread across other third-party cloud services.

item.title: Live Nation Reaches a Settlement With the DOJ Over Alleged Ticketing Monopoly
item.description: The lawsuit aiming to break up Live Nation and Ticketmaster looks like it's coming to an end.

item.title: Sandberg, Clegg join Nscale board as this ‘Stargate Norway’ startup hits $14.6B valuation
item.description: Nvidia-backed British AI infrastructure startup Nscale has raised another megaround of $2 billion.

item.title: Samsung’s Mario-themed microSD card for Switch 2 is 35 percent off
item.description: Nintendo has cut the cost of its Mario-themed Samsung microSD Express card with 256GB of storage, just in time for Mario Day. Normally $59.99 — and definitely not worth it at that price compared to other models that are typically less on a regular basis — it’s down to $39.99 at a ton of retailers, […]

item.title: PlayStation Store : Sony teste les prix « à la tête du client », et ça ne va pas plaire à tout le monde
item.description: Le PlayStation Store pourrait bientôt ne plus afficher le même prix pour tout le monde. Sony expérimente actuellement une tarification dynamique et personnalisée. Une pratique qui soulève déjà de nombreuses questions sur la transparence du géant japonais.

item.title: Saks Fifth Avenue store closures update: See the full list of doomed locations in 12 states
item.description: The latest list of closures will impact Neiman Marcus and Saks Fifth Avenue stores, including the one on Chicago’s Magnificent Mile. The list of Saks Fifth Avenue and Neiman Marcus store locations set to close continues to grow.

item.title: Comment caster l’écran de son téléphone Android sur un TV ?
item.description: Avec un smartphone, une tablette sous Android ou un ordinateur, il est possible d'afficher l'écran de son appareil directement sur un téléviseur. Tout cela sans aucun fil, de quoi remiser un câble HDMI. Voici comment s'y prendre.

item.title: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection is a creative creature-collecting RPG that more than scratches my turn-based itch
item.description: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection expands on Capcom's lionised creature-fighting series by allowing players to duel against beasties and uncover mysteries to save a troubled kingdom.

item.title: Want better sleep? The Dutch method is counterintuitive—but science says it works
item.description: Many Americans just lost an hour of shut-eye this weekend thanks to daylight saving time. Here’s how Europeans get a good night’s rest. After losing an hour of shut-eye thanks to daylight saving time, sleep is on many people’s minds today.

item.title: I found 3 Dell laptop deals with free gifts like Microsoft Office and extra storage — and these budget machines are perfect for business professionals and students
item.description: Dell's Windows 11 laptops include a host of gifts including free Microsoft Office and portable external drives.

item.title: Margos Got Money Troubles trailer teases a single mother starting an OnlyFans
item.description: Apple TV has dropped its trailer for "Margo's Got Money Troubles", starring Elle Fanning, Michelle Pfieffer, Nick Offerman and Nicole Kidman.

item.title: PlayStation Portal : la console portable de Sony chute aujourd’hui à un prix inédit
item.description: Le PlayStation Portal est l'accessoire permettant de jouer à la PS5 à distance, mais plus uniquement. S'il vous intéresse, il est actuellement disponible à 189 euros au lieu de 219 euros.

item.title: Stop relying on the grid and grab our favorite high-capacity DJI power station while its $500 off
item.description: As of March 9, you can get the DJI Power 2000 portable power station for $799, down from $1,299, at Amazon.

item.title: 5G, 100 Go et sans engagement : ce forfait mobile B&You a tout pour lui [Sponso]
item.description: Un forfait 5G, sans engagement, avec un joli volume de data, des prestations haut de gamme et un prix raisonnable : c’est possible. Il suffit juste d’aller faire un tour dans le catalogue de Bouygues Telecom pour trouver son bonheur.

item.title: Amazon’s Zoox will test its robotaxis in Dallas and Phoenix
item.description: Amazon’s self-driving subsidiary Zoox announced on Monday that it will begin testing its autonomous vehicles in Dallas and Phoenix. The company will initially deploy retrofitted Toyota Highlander SUVs with human safety drivers to map the new cities before eventually rolling out its purpose-built robotaxis. Zoox says these two cities will offer a chance to test its sensors and battery performance in unique conditions its cars haven't yet encountered in existing markets. Phoenix experiences extreme heat, dust and high-speed roads, while Dallas has more sprawling roads and varied weather compared...

item.title: De l’IA au satanisme : comment ChatGPT aide les victimes d’abus rituels à briser le silence
item.description: L’intelligence artificielle d’OpenAI ne sert pas qu’à rédiger des mails ou générer du code. ChatGPT jouerait un rôle moteur dans la hausse des signalements d’abus rituels organisés, en orientant les victimes vers les associations compétentes.

item.title: WhatsApp : ce petit changement visuel sur Android va rendre l’application bien plus agréable
item.description: WhatsApp change subtilement l'apparence des bulles de discussions pour les utilisateurs Android. La différence est ténue, mais devrait apaiser l'expérience visuelle à la longue.

item.title: BYD dévoile le Sealion 06 en version Flash Charging : autonomie XXL et recharge en 5 minutes
item.description: BYD vient de dévoiler une nouvelle version du SUV électrique, le Sealion 06 qui gagne en autonomie, et en recharge rapide. Cette dernière est désormais effectuée en 5 minutes seulement.

item.title: Non, Microsoft n’a pas banni l’utilisation du terme « Microslop »
item.description: Microsoft prend la parole après le buzz d'un internaute affirmant qu'il n'a pas pu écrire « Microslop » dans un avis laissé sur le Microsoft Store.

item.title: Voici les prix français de la MG4 électrique : plus d’autonomie et d’équipements pour un prix cassé
item.description: La MG4 vient de s'améliorer avec une nouvelle planche de bord et une nouvelle batterie. Ses tarifs français viennent de tomber : déjà bien placée en tarif catalogue, la voiture électrique affiche un rapport qualité/prix imbattable une fois l'immense remise de la marque retirée.

item.title: 'No major vulnerabilities' — Mullvad’s WireGuard implementation gets thumbs up from independent security audit
item.description: Mullvad’s latest security audit on GotaTun gets green light from independent audit, confirming no major vulnerabilities were found. Here's all you need to know.

item.title: iPhone 17e Review: So Much More Bang for Your Buck
item.description: Apple addressed nearly every complaint about the iPhone 16e and kept the price the same. It's a good deal.

item.title: Zoox starts mapping Dallas and Phoenix for its robotaxis
item.description: It's a precursor to launching robotaxis in those cities, though the Amazon-owned company is still waiting for federal approval to commercially operate its purpose-built AV.

item.title: ADN lance une formule « Starter » à petit prix : voici ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: ADN, la plateforme de streaming d’animes, dévoile une nouvelle formule d’abonnement pour les petits budgets. Pour 3,99 € par mois, les utilisateurs peuvent profiter d’un large catalogue d’œuvres, mais ça ne sera pas sans compromis.

item.title: SETI Thinks It Might Have Missed a Few Alien Calls. Here’s Why
item.description: The researchers who scan the skies for radio signals from extraterrestrials are now rethinking their approach.

item.title: Hasbro’s CEO has an AI Peppa Pig help design toys
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Chris Cocks, CEO of Hasbro. You know, Hasbro — the toy and game company that makes some of the most iconic products in the world, from toy lines like Transformers and My Little Pony to board and tabletop games like Monopoly, Magic: The Gathering, and Dungeons & Dragons. Chris was last […]

item.title: Anthropic says it found a heap of Firefox security flaws using new Claude tools, says 'AI is making it possible to detect severe security vulnerabilities at highly accelerated speeds'
item.description: Claude finds 14 high-severity Firefox bugs in just a few weeks, rivaling what Mozilla could do in months.
